nasb.text: And they asked Baruch, saying, “Tell us, please, how did you write all these words? Was it at his dictation?”

esv.text: Then they asked Baruch, “Tell us, please, how did you write all these words? Was it at his dictation?”

cnv.text: 他們向巴錄說：“請告訴我們，你怎樣寫下這一切話，是耶利米親口說的嗎？”

ccb.text: 请告诉我们，你是怎么写下这些话的？是耶利米口授的吗？”
